StudyHallPresence.title: StudyHallPresence
StudyHallPresence.description: Represents an active student's presence and selected study topic in the Global Study Hall

fullName.description: The full name or clinical nickname of the user

topic.description: The current subject ID they are studying

isGuest.description: Whether the student is a guest user

StudyHallQuestion.title: StudyHallQuestion
StudyHallQuestion.description: Represents a collaborative medical Q&A thread in the Global Study Hall

authorId.description: The Firebase UID or guest ID of the question author

questionText.description: The content of the clinical question

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the question was posted

StudyHallAnswer.title: StudyHallAnswer
StudyHallAnswer.description: An answer to a medical question in the study hall

authorId.description: UID or guest ID of the responder

/study_hall_presence/{presenceId}.description: Realtime active presence registry for the Global Study Hall

/study_hall_questions/{questionId}/answe.description: Subcollection of answers/solutions under a specific question
